name: Lighthouse Sip & Swing - Golf Simulators
about: Lighthouse Sip & Swing is a modern venue offering a bar and grill experience combined with indoor golf simulator bays. The facility uses Golfzon technology to provide a virtual golf environment accessible to both seasoned golfers and first-timers. It operates on an hourly rental basis with food and beverage service available on-site. The venue features a sports bar atmosphere with TVs and is designed for casual socializing and golf play.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by premium Golfzon simulator technology
Full bar and limited food menu available directly in the golf bays
Accommodates groups up to 6 people per bay, making it great for social outings
Multiple TVs in all areas for watching sports during play

food_and_drink.notes: Limited menu available with wings, baskets, sandwiches, and sides

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator system powering all golf bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available for $20 if you don't have your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers its own full bar and limited menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify a time for 18 holes, but pricing is based on hourly rates starting at $60 for the first hour and $40 for additional hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, all areas are open to all ages, though children under 16 must be accompanied by an adult (21+) at all times.
